pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy thinkin' his Brazil pick gonna samba all over the field — lookin' more like they're doin' the cha-cha with disaster.** Brazil's been lights out lately, but Zach gotta be sweatin' bullets 'cause he put his faith in Saudi Arabia, prob'ly thinkin' those oil reserves could score him some extra goals. Meanwhile, Bubba G's Morocco ain't no pushover — they're like that scrappy underdog waitin' to unleash the upset of the tourney. Prediction? Brazil's gonna back themselves and take this one, but only 'cause they gotta save Mustard Boy from slippin' further behind. Zach's sittin' on zero points — he might as well be draftin' his teams based off how cool their kits look.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach set to lead Switzerland to thrilling zero-point start
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy's draft strategy heavily relies on opponent's mercy.

pundit_takes.headline: Brazil and Morocco poised for clash of managerial confusion
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy and Bubba G to battle over who misunderstood draft better.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's Haiti plans to bring flair, possibly a point, to WC
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper banking on Haitian sunshine in Foxborough's June chill.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's Turkey predicted to escape Group D with style, luck optional
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Backpass Assassin hopes his first-place standing is more than just beginner's luck.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach's got all the Tier-1 clout but can't buy a point. Yikes.
Rafe drafted three ghosts and still tied for first. Definition of beginner's luck.
Rafe bodied Devin with three goals, and dad's next on his hit list.
Sim's brainfart: Rafe's chaos wrecked Gunner's favorite odds. Suck it, algorithms.
